title: Purple hearts 3d
description: Hearts texture pack to look purple in colour looks 3d/realistic
body:
This is a purple hearts resource pack. Existing ones are plain in looking, I modified the looks so it looks more realistic/shiny. Compatible with mob health indicator and such.

no requirements just a simple resource pack download zip and add it to your resource packs.

have tried with version 1.21.10 and 1.21.11 it works in both used the resource pack template so havent checked working with other versions will update when I do.
